inventory_2 Storage & Shipping

local_shipping

Shipped via expedited cold-chain logistics to maintain temperature integrity during transit.

What is Botulax 100 Units?

Botulax 100 Units is a Korean botulinum toxin type A product manufactured by Hugel and presented here as a professional catalog item for licensed clinics and distributors. This page supports B2B procurement review, manufacturer-document validation, batch verification workflow, and cold-chain handling alignment before order confirmation.

Mechanism of Action & Composition

Botulax contains botulinum toxin type A and is commonly reviewed in professional practice for temporary muscle relaxation through neuromuscular junction activity. In distributor and clinic evaluation, composition characteristics such as a 900kDa complex profile are considered alongside documentation and regulatory handling requirements.

Target Areas & Professional Use Cases

  • Glabellar lines — commonly reviewed by licensed professionals for precision treatment planning.
  • Crow’s feet — commonly reviewed by licensed professionals for periocular line management.
  • Forehead lines — commonly reviewed by licensed professionals for balanced facial protocol design.
  • Masseter / facial contouring review — commonly reviewed by licensed professionals for lower-face contour strategy.
  • Hyperhidrosis inquiry use case — commonly reviewed by licensed professionals based on regional product-use requirements.

Product Variants

Botulax 100 Units

Standard aesthetic catalog reference.

Botulax 200 Units

Higher-volume clinic procurement profile.

Botulax 300 Units

Bulk / high-volume professional inquiry option.

Preparation & Documentation

Professional teams should review official manufacturer documentation and local regulations before any handling workflow. Typical B2B checks include product sheet review, storage requirements, batch and lot record confirmation, and internal professional handling validation.

Clinical Advantages for B2B Buyers

For clinics and distributors, Botulax procurement benefits include Korean manufacturer sourcing, predictable catalog availability, cold-chain logistics continuity, professional documentation support, and a clear wholesale inquiry workflow aligned with medical procurement standards.

Wholesale Supply & Bulk Pricing

Available for Wholesale Inquiry

Wholesale pricing depends on destination country, quantity tier, logistics requirements, and current product availability. This catalog channel is intended for medical professionals, clinics, and authorized distributors managing professional procurement workflows.

Procurement Checklist

  • • Product availability
  • • MOQ / quantity tier
  • • Destination country
  • • Cold-chain shipping
  • • Product sheet / documentation request

Storage, Safety & Professional Handling

Botulax products are handled under refrigerated conditions at 2°C to 8°C with cold-chain shipping controls. Professional-use restrictions vary by country, and all clinics and distributors should review official manufacturer documentation and destination-market requirements before procurement and handling.

Botulax Wholesale FAQ

Is Botulax 100 Units available for wholesale inquiry?expand_more
Yes. Wholesale inquiry is available for qualified medical buyers, and final confirmation is based on destination, quantity, and current stock allocation.
What is the difference between Botulax 100, 200, and 300 Units?expand_more
The variants represent different unit presentations for different procurement needs. Clinics typically select by treatment volume planning, while distributors align by order profile and inventory strategy.
How is cold-chain integrity handled?expand_more
Cold-chain integrity is managed through temperature-controlled logistics processes designed to maintain required storage conditions during shipment.
Can I request product documentation before ordering?expand_more
Yes. Product documentation requests can be submitted during inquiry so your team can complete internal and regulatory review workflows before purchase decisions.
Who can purchase Botulax through this catalog?expand_more
This catalog is intended for licensed medical professionals, clinics, and authorized distributors in markets where procurement and handling are permitted.
warning

Professional Use Only

This product is presented for B2B catalog and wholesale inquiry purposes only. Eligibility, import rules, storage requirements, and professional-use restrictions may vary by country.

description
